title: Whats with the first 2 tracks on Vol 3 of NGEs soundtrack
display_title: Whats with the first 2 tracks on Vol 3 of NGEs soundtrack
wikitext:
[]: What's with the first 2 tracks on Vol. 3 of NGE's soundtrack?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Aug 03, 2017 4:12 pm The tracks are "Happiness is the Smell of Sin", and "Eternal Embrace". I'd never heard them in the show, are they unused tracks intended for a possible second opening or something?

[]: Re: What's with the first 2 tracks on Vol. 3 of NGE's soundtrack?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Aug 03, 2017 6:10 pm Those two tracks are neither composed nor arranged by Sagisu. I imagine they are extra tracks for the singer, as is commonplace on OP and ED singles.
